items.name: realmorphism
items.title: Realmorphism
items.description: A blocky tactile shadcn/ui theme for operational interfaces, with hard-offset shadows and motion states that communicate action affordance.

items.description: Knobs plus all three rolling picker kit sections and KitShowroom.
